title: Ceramica Black Square Large Planter
features: This massive black garden planter is perfect for all purpose planting, with a 45cm height you can plant a wide range of Flowers, Trees & Small Bushes. Perfect for your home, office, garden or place of your choice.
Made from durable plastic, lightweight and strong, with sturdy walls, means that it won't crack and will it last for many planting seasons & easy to relocate.
With a flared design it gives it a classy look and will add style to the the place of your choice.
Lightweight -Tall - Floor of pot is solid - Plastic Planter
description: Ceramica 'Milano' Large Square Flared Planter, Black Meet the Ceramica 'Milano' – where elegance meets practicality. This square flared planter, dressed in a classic black, brings a touch of sophistication to any setting. Its unique design is not just a visual treat but a spacious home for your cherished plants, from blooming flowers to lush small trees and bushes. Crafted from lightweight yet durable plastic, the Milano Planter offers the perfect blend of portability and resilience. Whether you're looking to decorate your living room, balcony, or workspace, its versatile design ensures it fits seamlessly in both indoor and outdoor settings. Though it comes without drainage holes, the planter is designed to allow for easy modification, enabling you to drill holes at the bottom for optimal plant health. Embrace the blend of aesthetic appeal and practicality with the Ceramica 'Milano' Planter. Its sleek design and functional features make it an indispensable addition for gardening aficionados and design enthusiasts alike. Key Features: Elegant Milano flared design in a chic black finish Made from lightweight and durable plastic Ample space for flowers, small trees, and bushes Versatile for both indoor and outdoor use No drainage holes, but suitable for easy modification Specification: Material: Durable lightweight plastic Colour: Black Dimensions: L: 29.5cm/11.61", W: 29.5cm/11.61", H: 44.5cm/17.52" Usage: Suitable for home and office environments Includes: 1x 'Milano' Large Square Flared Planter Discover the charm of the Ceramica 'Milano' Planter – a seamless blend of form, function, and flexibility.
